text:
is not
concordant with these three planets. Saturn represents worker. An
egoistic worker attracts the wrath of all-his superiors, his
colleagues, and his subordinates. The egoistic employee quits or
loses job on account of the wrath he ignites in his superiors. So
astrologically saturn and Mars are considered enemies.
Dragon Head is Tamoguna or laziness, where as Mars
stands for energy and speed. So Mars and Dragon Head are
enemies.
Mercury is intellect. Normally physical power and intellect
do not go together. Those who are physically strong, first hit and
then think. Thus Mars and Mercury are enemies.
Friendly to Mars is Venus which stands for female, luxury
and wealth. Mars indicates marriage and Venus, the Wife. So they
are friends. Jupiter is guide or Guru or preceptor. Sun is the King
(Rajoguna). So also Mars has Rajoguna. It is also said that Mars
represents the commander-in-Chief of the Army; Sun-The king
and Guru-Raja Purohit. Thus Mars is the friend of Sun and
Jupiter.
